rationale.R1.6: The revised version is carefully copy-edited with consistent register and no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: Some uncertainty was assumed in the output, particularly regarding model identifiers and specific results.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift or substantial changes to the active set.
rationale.RX.4: There are no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced; minor regressions were avoided.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
